raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, a transaction went through for an unauthorized purchase of around XXXX dollars made in XXXX XXXX, which is nearly two hours away from my location, on my AMEX gift card. About two days later, I called AMEX to dispute the charges, and they opened up a case. After waiting for around a month, they contacted me saying that my dispute was declined, and now I'm XXXX dollars short.
